about.imageAlt: Patty, the maker behind Patty's Jewels
about.label: The maker behind the work
about.title: Thirty years of service. Five years of craft.
body: Hi, I'm Patty. I spent 30 years as a state employee, and during that time I built a second life in sales, selling everything from Tupperware to Amway and eventually jewelry with Park Lane, where I became one of their top salespeople.
When I retired, I asked myself — why not learn to make my own? That was five years ago, and I'm still learning and loving every step of the process. I hope you enjoy your shopping experience here.

featured.label: Handcrafted pieces
featured.title: A glimpse of the work
featured.sub: Each piece you see is a sample. Every item can be made to fit your style, your size, and your preferences.

craft.label: What makes it special
craft.title: Made by hand. Made with care.

items.title: Natural Stones
items.body: Every piece features real gemstones, hand-selected for their color and character. No synthetics, just the real thing.

items.title: Made by One Person
items.body: Patty makes every piece herself. No factory, no assembly line. Just one person who genuinely loves what she does.

items.title: Made to Fit You
items.body: Bracelets in your size, necklaces at your length, earrings that are nickel-free and hypoallergenic. Each piece is a sample, so tell Patty what you want.

cta.label: Custom orders welcome
cta.title: Are you ready? Let's go!
cta.sub: Each piece can be made to fit your style. Reach out and let's talk about what you have in mind. Patty would love to hear from you.
